title: Crispy German Herb Salad
description: A low-fat-friendly, herbal, crisp autumn dish featuring five spice powder and caramelized elements for a monsoon-season twist.

ingredients.name: Caramelized Onions (optional)
ingredients.notes: Pre-made or fresh, optional for added depth of flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, combine Crispy German Herb Salad Mix and Fresh Herbs. Add Five Spice Powder.
Drizzle Olive Oil over the mixture to help bind ingredients together.
For caramelized onions, if using: Slice an onion thinly and sauté in olive oil until golden brown and deeply caramelized. Set aside.
If you have caramelized onions ready, mix them into the salad with Five Spice Powder and Olive Oil for a sweet, smoky flavor.
